MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-03-417107 WITH CASE CGC-06-449398
Off Calendar May-24-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Steven W. Yuen, Esq., of Brayton Purcell, 898-1555, for Plaintiff and Moving Party
RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFFS RONALD KEISER, as Wrongful Death Heir, and as Successor-in-Interest to Melvin Keiser, Deceased; and DOUGLAS KEISER, as Legal Heir of Melvin Keiser, Deceased's MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS (CASE CGC-06-417107 WITH CASE CGC-03-449398) FOR ALL PURPOSES INCLUDING TRIAL WAS GRANTED WITH CASE 417107 DEEMED THE LEAD CASE. ALL FUTURE FILINGS SHALL BE FILED UNDER THE LEAD CASE. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Prevailing party to submit proposed order. (301/JLW) Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton, CSR #1558.
